business.name: Harvey's Plumbing Co
business.tagline: Fast fixes, fair prices, trusted locally

hero.headline: *Emergency plumbing repairs* in Chattanooga — 24/7 response
hero.subheadline: Licensed plumbers ready to tackle your toughest leaks, clogs, and pipe problems. Same-day service available throughout the Tennessee Valley.

services_section.label: WHAT WE DO
services_section.heading: Complete Plumbing Solutions
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to full installations, we handle every plumbing challenge

services.title: Emergency Pipe Repair
services.description: Burst pipes, major leaks, and water damage prevention. Our emergency crew responds within 60 minutes to minimize damage and restore your plumbing system.

services.title: Drain Cleaning & Unclogging
services.description: Professional drain snaking, hydro-jetting, and root removal. We clear kitchen sinks, bathroom drains, and main sewer lines completely.

services.title: Water Heater Installation
services.description: Tank and tankless water heater installation, repair, and maintenance. Energy-efficient upgrades that reduce your monthly utility bills.

services.title: Fixture Installation
services.description: New faucets, toilets, sinks, and shower installations. We handle the plumbing connections and ensure everything functions perfectly.

services.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: Advanced leak detection technology finds hidden water leaks behind walls and under slabs. Stop wasting water and prevent costly damage.

about.heading: Chattanooga's Reliable Plumbing Experts
about.body: Harvey's Plumbing Co has been serving the Tennessee Valley for over 15 years. Our experienced team handles everything from simple faucet repairs to complex re-piping projects. We're committed to honest pricing, quality workmanship, and treating every home like our own.

reviews.name: Jennifer R.
reviews.text: Called Harvey's at 11 PM when our main pipe burst in the basement. They were here within 45 minutes and had it fixed by 2 AM. Saved us thousands in water damage. Professional crew and fair emergency pricing.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Harvey's team installed our new tankless water heater last month. They explained everything clearly, cleaned up completely, and the installation looks perfect. Already seeing lower gas bills.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Had a stubborn kitchen sink clog that three other plumbers couldn't fix. Harvey's brought in their hydro-jet equipment and cleared 20 years of buildup. Finally drains like new again.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Chattanooga
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout the Tennessee Valley region

cta.heading: Ready to Fix Your Plumbing Problem?
cta.body: Don't let plumbing issues get worse. Our experienced team is standing by to provide fast, reliable service at honest prices.
